description: Two recipes in one paste — V60 and AeroPress
sourceText:
My Morning Recipes

V60 Recipe:
- 15g coffee, medium-fine grind
- 250g water at 96°C
- Bloom with 50g for 30 seconds
- Pour to 150g, then to 250g
- Total time: 2:30-3:00

AeroPress Recipe:
- 18g coffee, fine grind
- 200g water at 85°C
- Inverted method
- Add all water, stir 10 times, steep for 1 minute 30 seconds
- Flip and press for 30 seconds
- Total time: about 2:30
